ddls:
CREATE TABLE "files" (
  "file_info_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "detail" TEXT /* Detail of the file (e.g., Flow cytometry result, Flow cytometry compensation or control) */,
  "filesize_bytes" INTEGER /* Size of the file in bytes */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "original_file_name" TEXT /* Original name of the file */,
  "workspace_id" INTEGER /* ID of the workspace where the file is stored */,
  "file_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file type (e.g., fcs, txt) */,
  "file_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file category (e.g., Flow cytometry result, Flow cytometry compensation or control) */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the file was uploaded */,
  "uploader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who uploaded the file */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path where the file is stored */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum to ensure file integrity */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the file is active (not deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_info_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_files_workspace_id FOREIGN KEY ("workspace_id") REFERENCES workspaces ("workspace_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_files_uploader_id FOREIGN KEY ("uploader_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_files_file_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_type_id") REFERENCES file_types ("file_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_files_file_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_category_id") REFERENCES file_categories ("file_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_types" (
  "file_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file type */,
  "file_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the file type (e.g., fcs, txt) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the file type */,
  "is_binary" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the file type is binary */,
  "default_extension" TEXT /* Default file extension for the type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_categories" (
  "file_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file category */,
  "file_category_name" TEXT /* Name of the file category (e.g., Flow cytometry result, Flow cytometry compensation or control) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the file category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categorization) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the category is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES file_categories ("file_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_details" (
  "file_detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file detail */,
  "file_info_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file */,
  "detail_name" TEXT /* Name of the detail (e.g., compensation controls, stained control) */,
  "detail_value" TEXT /* Value of the detail */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the detail is required */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the detail is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_details_file_info_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_info_id") REFERENCES files ("file_info_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workspaces" (
  "workspace_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each workspace */,
  "workspace_name" TEXT /* Name of the workspace */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the workspace */,
  "laboratory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the laboratory to which the workspace belongs */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the workspace is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("workspace_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workspaces_laboratory_id FOREIGN KEY ("laboratory_id") REFERENCES laboratories ("laboratory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "laboratories" (
  "laboratory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each laboratory */,
  "laboratory_name" TEXT /* Name of the laboratory */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the laboratory */,
  "contact_person_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contact person (researcher) for the laboratory */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the laboratory is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("laboratory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_laboratories_contact_person_id FOREIGN KEY ("contact_person_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the researcher */,
  "laboratory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the laboratory the researcher belongs to */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the researcher is active */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the researcher's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_researchers_laboratory_id FOREIGN KEY ("laboratory_id") REFERENCES laboratories ("laboratory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "file_info_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file being accessed */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher accessing the file */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the file was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the file was accessed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_access_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_access_file_info_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_info_id") REFERENCES files ("file_info_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file version */,
  "file_info_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "uploader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who created the version */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the version */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the version is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_versions_file_info_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_info_id") REFERENCES files ("file_info_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_versions_uploader_id FOREIGN KEY ("uploader_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, laboratory manager, administrator) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user is active */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the role is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "file_access" INTEGER /* Permission to access files */,
  "file_upload" INTEGER /* Permission to upload files */,
  "file_delete" INTEGER /* Permission to delete files */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the permission is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)
